title: Terrain Finding
description: A single result from one Terrain rule. Stable from v0.2.0 per docs/PRODUCT.md §8 and §18.

version.description: Schema version. Stable from v0.2.0; one-cycle deprecation on changes.

rule_id.description: Stable rule identifier. Format: terrain/<category>/<rule-name>, lowercase, hyphenated.

severity.description: error: gate-blocking, emitted as JUnit failure. warning: advisory, Step Summary + annotations only (not in JUnit). notice: informational.

tier.description: Rule tier at the time of emission. Preview rules ship default-off.

cause_loc.description: Where the change that caused this finding lives. Often equals primary_loc.

cause_path.description: Ordered chain of graph nodes from primary_loc back to cause_loc, traversing the unified dependency graph. Empty for findings without cross-stack causation.

short_message.description: Single-line summary; used in JUnit failure message, GH annotation title, terminal first line.

long_message.description: Multi-line context; used in Step Summary and JUnit failure body.

evidence.description: Optional concrete evidence: I/O examples, before/after, metric deltas.

suggestions.description: Ordered list of candidate fix actions.

docs_url.description: Canonical rule page URL for the finding's rule.

reproduction.description: Exact CLI command to reproduce this finding locally.

metadata.description: Rule-specific structured metadata. Schema is per-rule; consumers should not depend on specific keys without coordinating with the rule's doc page.

node_kind.description: Optional: the graph-node kind at this location (surface, eval, test, code_unit, etc.).

node_id.description: Optional: the graph-node ID for cause-path traversal references.

io_examples.description: For regression / snapshot rules: concrete I/O examples showing before/after behavior.

metric_delta.description: For metric-based rules: the measurement that triggered.

code_excerpt.description: Source code excerpt at the location. Subject to redaction per `redact_source: true` in terrain.yaml.

applies_to.description: Where this suggestion applies, if more specific than the finding's primary_loc.

command.description: If the suggestion can be applied by running a command, the command. Optional.
